name: memory-first-on-bash
description: Remind agent to query memory before bash codebase scanning
message: REMINDER: Query /memory recall before scanning the codebase. Memory-first is non-negotiable in Embry OS.

name: memory-first-on-grep
description: Remind agent to query memory before using Grep tool
message: REMINDER: Query /memory recall before scanning the codebase. Memory-first is non-negotiable in Embry OS.

name: memory-first-on-glob
description: Remind agent to query memory before using Glob tool
message: REMINDER: Query /memory recall before scanning the codebase. Memory-first is non-negotiable in Embry OS.

name: memory-first-on-find
description: Remind agent to query memory before using Find tool (Pi equivalent of Glob)
message: REMINDER: Query /memory recall before scanning the codebase. Memory-first is non-negotiable in Embry OS.

name: cpu-thrash-warning
description: Detect excessive parallel process spawning in commands
message: WARNING: Detected potential mass process spawning. Use bounded concurrency (max 8 concurrent). Use the batch_exec tool instead.

name: env-leak-guard
description: Detect commands that would print secrets to stdout
message: SECURITY: Do not read environment files or secrets directly. Use indirect references (e.g., check existence with test -f, read individual vars with dotenv).

name: env-leak-guard-read
description: Detect Read tool targeting secret files
message: SECURITY: Do not read environment files or secrets directly. Use indirect references (e.g., check existence with test -f, read individual vars with dotenv).

name: skill-run-sh-pattern
description: Ensure skills are invoked via run.sh not raw Python
message: Skills must be invoked via run.sh, not by calling Python directly. Use: .pi/skills/<name>/run.sh <args>
